steps.title: Expand the right side
steps.content: Distribute 2 on the right side of $w - 12 = 2(w + 6)$: $$w - 12 = 2w + 12$$

steps.title: Isolate w
steps.content: Subtract $w$ from both sides: $$-12 = w + 12$$ Then subtract 12 from both sides: $$-24 = w$$ That matches the correct answer: D is correct.
